title: Kaworus Cat The Real Angel before Kaworu
display_title: Kaworus Cat The Real Angel before Kaworu
wikitext:
[]: Kaworu's Cat: The Real Angel before Kaworu?             Quote Post by kasuturo » Tue Mar 04, 2008 7:56 pm I don't have source for this, but I learned that when Kaworu was created as a character, he had a black cat, which, at the end, was Tabris and used Kaworu to reach NERV, or something like that. Then, GAINAX thought that was stupid and made Kaworu the real Angel. Ironically, in Sadamoto's illustration of Kaworu for the ninth volume of his manga, he's holding a black cat on his hands. Here's the image: Is this true at the very end?

[]: Re: Kaworu's Cat: The Real Angel before Kaworu?             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Tue Mar 04, 2008 8:23 pm kasuturo wrote: I don't have source for this, but I learned that when Kaworu was created as a character, he had a black cat, which, at the end, was Tabris and used Kaworu to reach NERV, or something like that. Then, GAINAX thought that was stupid and made Kaworu the real Angel. <snippy>

[]:             Quote Post by RandomStuff » Tue Mar 04, 2008 8:34 pm that would make for an interesting twist.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Mar 04, 2008 8:35 pm Original episode synopsis Prototype illustrations of Kaworu (with cat included) I'm not sure where the idea that the cat was the Angel came from.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Mar 04, 2008 9:10 pm I read a while back somewhere in the Onegeek archives that the cat was supposed to be the Angel, and I'm pretty sure it was "Bochan no Baado" who said it.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Mar 04, 2008 10:11 pm Source or it didn't happen.

[]:             Quote Post by The Raddy » Mon Mar 10, 2008 2:36 am I remember this rumor from my early days of Eva fandom (around 2002, I think) when there was a Kaworu website that had this listed under "facts about Kaworu." The site no longer exists (http://kaworu.bishounen.nu/ ...it was called The Final Seashore, anybody remember it?) and there was no source listed for the information. I'm gonna guess this rumor is bogus. I can see how it got started, though, what with Sadamoto's cat illustrations with the early Kaworu sketches.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Mon Mar 10, 2008 3:48 am Kaworu never has a cat in the anime though

[]:             Quote Post by RandomStuff » Mon Mar 10, 2008 8:22 pm Well in the manga he kills a kitty but that's probably not very relavent.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Tue Mar 11, 2008 1:06 pm I think that was homage/reference to production plans

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Mar 12, 2008 6:18 pm The cat, the 17th Angel. Kaworu, the 18th Angel, killed that cat. His first act of betrayal to Seele. It all makes sense. Or he's just more of a dog person.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Wed Mar 12, 2008 11:33 pm we need a picture of kaworu as a catboy.

[]:             Quote Post by honsou » Thu Mar 13, 2008 10:08 am slothen wrote: we need a picture of kaworu as a catboy.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Mar 13, 2008 2:05 pm http://www.animenation.net/forums/showthread.php?t=130908&page=11 http://www.animenation.net/forums/showthread.php?t=130908&page=31

[]:             Quote Post by zimlord » Thu Mar 13, 2008 2:21 pm well done. and hot damn, i need some misat-O's.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Thu Mar 13, 2008 3:07 pm well done

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Mar 13, 2008 3:17 pm Megami no D00m did at least one of these.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Mar 13, 2008 7:35 pm I remember seeing those in some ANF achieve. Nice! (Misato-O's huh? If they make them gluten-free, I'm all for it! )

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Thu Mar 13, 2008 8:03 pm Kudos to Magami!

[]:             Quote Post by honsou » Fri Mar 14, 2008 9:59 am Mr. Tines wrote: PIX
